Top 10 Most Followed Accounts On Twitter / X In The World Are you curious about the people with the top Twitter or X followers? In this article, we will discuss the top 10 most followed accounts on X. Cristiano Ronaldo Cristiano Ronaldo, the spirited Portuguese footballer, is renowned for his energy and determination. He bridges global gaps through his remarkable skills, unifying fans worldwide. With the most followed Twitter account among sports personalities, he leaves his mark at renowned clubs like Juventus FC, Real Madrid, and Manchester United. According to Forbes's estimations, Ronaldo is the world's highest-paid athlete in the world in 2023. Justin Bieber Justin Bieber, a celebrated singer, is synonymous with infectious energy on stage. His vibrant performances inspire fans to mimic his singing style and dance moves and rank him the top entertainer among the most followed accounts on Twitter. From the beginning of his career, Bieber has retained a devoted fanbase, evolving his image and music style as he matured into a global megastar. Bieber was notably ranked third in Forbes’s Celebrity 100 list in 2017. Rihanna Age: 36 Residence: Beverly Hills, USA Rihanna, the talented Barbadian singer and actress, mesmerises fans with her captivating skills. A true megastar and beauty entrepreneur, Rihanna's numerous hits and thriving Fenty Beauty business have propelled her to Twitter stardom, making her the fifth most followed person on Twitter. Interestingly, Rihanna is one of America’s youngest self-made billionaires, as estimated in 2022. She also ranks 20 in America's Self-Made Women list by Forbes in 2023. Katy Perry Age: 40 Residence: Beverly Hills, USA Katy Perry, the charismatic American singer and actress, has earned her place in the entertainment industry through dedication and hard work. Her journey from humble beginnings to global stardom exemplifies the rewards of perseverance. As a renowned pop star, Perry stands among the people with the highest number of Twitter followers.

What Are the Most Followed Twitter (X) Accounts? [Nov 2024] - Oberlo The most followed person on Twitter (X) is its owner Elon Musk, with 203.4 million followers. Former US President Barack Obama follows, with 131.6 million. But who is the most followed person on Twitter and what are the 10 biggest Twitter accounts? In this post, we take an in-depth look at the most followed Twitter accounts in 2024. 10 most followed Twitter accounts (as of November 2024) Rank Twitter (X) account Number of followers 1 Elon Musk 203.4 million 2 Barack Obama 131.6 million 3 Cristiano Ronaldo 113.6 million 4 Justin Bieber 109.8 million 5 Rihanna 108.4 million 6 Katy Perry 105.7 million 7 Narendra Modi 103.4 million 8 Taylor Swift 94.8 million 9 Donald Trump 93.0 million 10 Ariana Grande 85.3 million Most followed Twitter accounts: top 10 1. Elon Musk (203.4 million) Username: @elonmusk Account created: Jun 2nd, 2009 The most followed person on Twitter is none other than the owner of the platform itself, Elon Musk. As of November 2024, he has 203.4 million followers—the only person with more than 200 million followers. Also the CEO of SpaceX and Tesla, Musk is known for his visionary ideas and sometimes controversial tweets, and uses the platform to announce company updates, share personal insights, and even move markets with his posts. His influence extends beyond technology, reaching into cultural and financial realms, making him a central figure on Twitter. 2. Barack Obama (131.6 million) Username: @BarackObama Account created: Mar 5th, 2007 Former President Barack Obama is the second-most followed person on Twitter, with a significant following of 131.6 million. His account is known for its inspiring messages, policy commentary, and support for various social causes. Obama’s tweets often go viral, reflecting his continued influence and popularity worldwide.

Most Followed Accounts on Social Media (Oct 2024) With approximately 1 billion total followers, Cristiano Ronaldo is the most-followed person across social media platforms. Most Followed Accounts on Instagram Aside from Instagram’s own account, Cristiano Ronaldo has the most followers on Instagram with over 600 million. Another soccer star (Lionel Messi) currently ranks third for most Instagram followers, just over 100 million behind rival Ronaldo. With the exception of YouTube’s MrBeast (over 315 million subscribers) and T-Series (over 270 million subscribers), each of Instagram’s top 20 accounts has more followers than all other social media accounts. Most Subscribed Channels on YouTube Music and kids content is king on YouTube with 7 channels regularly uploading music videos and 6 frequently posting child-friendly content. T-Series was the largest channel by subscribers for some time with over 270 million subscribers – almost 90 million more than any other channel...apart from one. As of August 2024, MrBeast is the top channel on YouTube by subscribers. The channel has seen a meteoric rise in recent months, climbing from under 100 million subscribers in July 2022 to over 300 million subscribers now. Despite not yet featuring on the list, Cristiano Ronaldo broke records when he joined YouTube in August 2024. The @cristiano YouTube channel reached 28 million subscribers in 24 hours – a feat not previously achieved by any channel in its first month. India is represented twice in the top four channels. Just 4 channels (MrBeast, PewDiePie, Like Nastya, and Justin Bieber) are primarily based around a single person.
